 Pick the Large or Medium McMenu В® you want and turn it into a Friends Meal.

More good news, Denys!

From now on, you can compose a Friends Meal not only with any Large McMenu В® , but also with any Medium McMenu В® !

вҖңAny McMenu В® вҖқ, you ask? ThatвҖҷs right. We listened to you and now there's loads of choice in terms of composition and size.

From the Maestro Piccante Pia and the Veggie Deluxe to the McChicken В®. Prefer a different burger instead? Anything is possible! Big or small appetite? You pick your favourite Large or Medium McMenu В®... and turn it into a Friends Meal.

That way, you get lots of tasty treats, plus 1 of the 4 Friends mugs* or 1 of the 6 Friends figurines!

Finished reading this email? Then go ahead and order your Friends Meal now. рҹҳң
